identity.name: Busboys and Poets
identity.notes: Official DC-area menu family confirmed; Columbia navigation is supporting identity only.

attempts.outcome: No official allergen, nutrition, or ingredient matrix found

proposedChanges: Exclude alcohol, modifiers, category rows, and duplicate presentations; retain current DC food, brunch, dessert, and kids products.
Keep direct allergen fields unavailable absent a real official matrix.
Corrected substitute semantics for vegan egg/tuna and vegan cheesecake; retained egg and added milk for egg-and-cheddar burger.
